analysis: The project contains a static website focused on black holes with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The current theme needs to be enhanced with a cosmic, dark aesthetic featuring animated black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML structure is present but requires completion of interactive sections, and the CSS needs to be updated to fully realize the dark, cosmic theme with animations. The JavaScript file should be completed to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including interactive elements and animations.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
